name: golang-opentelemetry-contrib-dev
title: golang-opentelemetry-contrib-dev
description:
Collection of 3rd-party packages for OpenTelemetry-Go
OpenTelemetry-Go Contrib is a collection of extensions for the
opentelemetry project. It provides 3rd parth resource detectors,
propagators, samplers, and instrumentation as submodules.
.
OpenTelemetry-Go Contrib contains common values used across all
instrumentation, exporter, and detector contributions.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-opentelemetry-contrib-dev because Collection of 3rd-party packages for OpenTelemetry-Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-opentelemetry-contrib-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-opentelemetry-contrib-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-opentelemetry-contrib-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
